# SiteButcher

> SiteButcher is a desktop application for mass-producing, deploying and managing websites at scale from a single dashboard. It runs locally on the user's own machine — sites, keywords, API keys and credentials never leave the user's computer.

## What it does

- **Bulk website generation**: full pipeline from keyword to live site — semantic core, AI-written content, AI-generated images, HTML assembly and deployment.
- **Multi-site management**: create and oversee hundreds of sites from one desktop board, with shared settings and per-site overrides.
- **Visual variety**: 40+ visual styles so sites in a network look distinct.
- **Any language with RTL**: localized output in any language the user adds, including full right-to-left support.
- **Drafts & preview**: preview sites privately, re-render layouts or regenerate images before attaching a domain.
- **Multi-account deployment**: connect many Google, Cloudflare and registrar accounts; distribute sites across them.
- **Domain operations**: check availability, generate names, view pricing and bulk-register domains, then manage DNS.
- **Your own servers**: deploy to infrastructure you own over SSH with automatic web-server config and HTTPS.
- **Google Search Console integration**: verify ownership, submit sitemaps, request indexing and review performance across many accounts.
- **Live monitoring**: uptime, SSL and HTTP checks for every published site.

## Privacy model

- Local-first by design. SiteButcher runs on the user's own computer.
- There is no central server storing user projects, keywords or credentials.
- Generated sites, drafts, API keys and account tokens are stored only on the user's machine.
- Sites deploy directly from the user's computer to servers the user owns.

## Key facts

- Platform: Windows desktop application.
- Pricing: available by request (contact for access).
- Contact: support@sitebutcher.com
- Status: actively developed.

## Links

- Home: https://sitebutcher.com/
